DP.257.0000:
...You are?\f
OK, you’re [0103,0000].
I’m Riley.\f
I’m a Trainer, and yes, it is a bit
odd that I would be training here.\f
If you’d like, we could team up.
The wild Pokémon here are restless.\f
DP.257.0002:
Riley: If your Pokémon get hurt,
I’ll heal them up.
DP.257.0003:
Riley: Hi, [0103,0000].
Let’s team up.\r
The Pokémon seem to be restless.\f
DP.257.0004:
Riley: ...Are you going back?\f
I’ll be hanging around here.
It would be good if you came back.\f
DP.257.0005:
Riley: I get it now. You’re
responsible for agitating the Pokémon.\f
I don’t care what good reason you
may have, but I don’t want you\r
bringing any trouble into my mine.\f
DP.257.0006:
Grunt 1: We’re Team Galactic!
We’ll take all the Pokémon we want!\r
Isn’t that right, partner?\f
DP.257.0007:
Grunt 2: You said it, brother!
So that’s what we’re gonna do!\f
We’re abducting all the Pokémon from
this rusted-out Iron Island!\f
DP.257.0008:
Riley: To share in all the joys and
all the sorrows...\f
That is how all the Trainers and
Pokémon live in Sinnoh!\f
I won’t allow anyone to defy that
code of ethics!\f
Come on, [0103,0000]!
This is one battle we can’t lose!\f
DP.257.0009:
Grunt 1: Stop! I said stop!
Your combination is so sick!\r
The both of you, and your Pokémon...\f
Let’s beat it, partner!\f
DP.257.0010:
Grunt 2: You said it, brother!\f
We don’t even know what Team 
Galactic’s big plan is anyway!\f
DP.257.0011:
Riley: Thanks.
You really helped me out.\f
Listen, I have a Pokémon Egg
here.\f
Would you take it with you?
DP.257.0012:
Riley: Thanks!\f
I’d like you to show the Pokémon
that’s inside the Egg all sorts\r
of new places.\f
DP.257.0013:
Riley: Thank you...\f
But you don’t have room to take
another Pokémon.\f
All right, then.
I’ll wait here for you.
DP.257.0014:
Riley: I hope you’ll accept it as
a token of our friendship.\f
DP.257.0015:
Riley: Spending time with you was
very enjoyable.\f
I intend to test my skills in other
places from now on.\f
Let’s meet again!
Take care on the way out.
DP.257.0018:
Riley: Haha, I’d have to agree.\f
People training here would be those
with too much time on their hands.
DP.257.0019:
Riley: This used to be a fairly
thriving ore mine once upon a time.\f
I guess the steel ore’s played out.
There’s only Pokémon here now.
DP.257.0020:
Riley: Have you met Byron?
The Leader of Canalave Gym?\f
He’s asked me to become a Gym Leader,
but there’s his son Roark to consider.
DP.257.0021:
Riley: Imagine what it would be like
for a Steel-type Pokémon user to\r
battle a Steel type.\f
Would that be like battling yourself,
I wonder?\f
I mean, it’s a lot harder to defeat
one’s self than anyone else.
DP.257.0022:
Riley: What’s going on here, though?
The native Pokémon are restless...\f
I don’t like this...
Let’s hurry.
